title: Prevent Java Future Keyword Conflicts
description: Programming languages evolve over time, and new versions of Java introduce additional keywords. If future keywords are used in the current code, it may result in compatibility issues when transitioning to newer versions of Java. The code may fail to compile or behave unexpectedly due to conflicts with newly introduced keywords. This rule specifically reports an issue when _ (underscore) is used in versions prior to Java 22.
recommendation: Avoid using future keywords in the current code to prevent potential conflicts with newer versions of Java. Specifically, refrain from using underscore (_) in versions prior to Java 22.
impact: Prevents potential compatibility issues and unexpected behavior when transitioning to newer versions of Java.

checks.message: Avoid using future keywords in the current code to prevent potential conflicts with newer versions of Java. Specifically, refrain from using underscore (_) in versions prior to Java 22.
